flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Ridge Technical College fell 98% between 2021 and 2024 (15.3% → 0.3%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Ridge Technical College fell 84% between 2006 and 2009 (83.6% → 13.7%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 5 pp at Ridge Technical College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (84.7% vs 89.8%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Ridge Technical College rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 (335 → 407).
